entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A legume crop used in an intercropping ecosystem and targeted for pest control.

entities.name: CORIANDER
entities.description: An aromatic herb crop intercropped with chickpea.

entities.name: JATROPHA OIL
entities.description: A botanical insecticide derived from Jatropha curcas seed oil used for pest control.

entities.name: NSKE
entities.description: Neem Seed Kernel Extract used as a biopesticide for pest control.

entities.name: NPV
entities.description: Nucleopolyhedrovirus used as a biopesticide for pest control.

entities.name: HELICOVERPA ARMIGERA
entities.description: A pest insect that causes damage to chickpea and coriander.

entities.name: THYSANOPLUSIA ORICHALCEA
entities.description: A pest insect targeted by the evaluated biopesticides.

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced per unit area, used to measure the efficacy of treatments.

entities.name: DAMAGE
entities.description: The level of harm caused by pests to the crops.

entities.name: INTERCROPPING
entities.description: The practice of growing two or more crops in the same field simultaneously.

entities.name: INTEGRATED PEST MANAGEMENT
entities.description: A comprehensive strategy for insect pest control incorporating various methods.
